title: senecio calingastensis
intro: Senecio calingastensis, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Senecio calingastensis include relief from digestive issues, reduction in fever, and alleviation of skin irritations. Senecio calingastensis can be prepared as a tea or infuse its leaves in hot water to create an herbal remedy for its various health benefits.
